creator: miguelmclara@gmail.com
text:
This is working fine now... Probably google changed something at there side too!

Version 38.0.2125.104 (290379) (64-bit) Works (altough a 2 weeks ago it dind't crash but any videos I tried to send from Plex or youtube should crashed the extension but not the browser)

But today it works and with the same version of the extention (Version 38.0.2125.104 (290379) (64-bit))

So the only explanation possible is a the update of the dongle it self!
